Florence Griswold Museum.failed_test_comment: Calendar HTML is blocked by Cloudflare from this environment, and wp-json/tribe/events/v1/events returned 0 upcoming events for 2026-03-11 onward, so a dry run would parse 0 rows.

Hill-Stead Museum.fail_implement: Calendar HTML and wp-json/tribe/events API are both blocked by a Cloudflare managed challenge from this environment, so there is no stable official HTML or JSON payload to parse.

Housatonic Museum of Art.failed_test_comment: Official What’s On pages currently expose exhibitions, receptions, a podcast entry, and past virtual talk pages, but no upcoming qualifying talks, workshops, or family art activities, so a dry run would parse 0 rows.

Mattatuck Museum.fail_implement: Calendar month, list, and root pages are all blocked by a Cloudflare managed challenge from this environment, so there is no stable official HTML or JSON payload to parse.

MoCA CT.failed_test_comment: Official upcoming calendar entries are currently paid Art Adventures classes, paid talk/conversation events, or excluded formats such as opening receptions, film screenings, performances, and members-only tours, so a dry run would parse 0 free qualifying rows.

Mystic Museum of Art.fail_implement: Official events and event_programs pages are blocked by a Cloudflare managed challenge from this environment, so there is no stable official HTML or JSON payload to parse.

New Britain Museum of American Art.fail_implement: Official Tessitura API is reachable, but qualifying detail pages are intermittently replaced by an Imperva/Incapsula managed-challenge interstitial, so repeated dry runs are unstable and can drop from non-empty to 0 rows without code changes.

Slater Memorial Museum.failed_test_comment: Official events and event-series pages are reachable and the recurring Lecture Series is described as free with no registration, but the currently accessible March 2026 calendar only shows a lecture on 2026-03-11 plus excluded storytime/show items, so from 2026-03-13 onward a dry run would parse 0 qualifying rows.

The Aldrich Contemporary Art Museum.failed_test_comment: Official events page is server-rendered and readable, but the future free items currently exposed are Third Saturdays free-admission listings, Story Time for Kids entries, and All Ages Discovery Tour entries, while sampled Public Programs such as Sensory Saturday, Care and Connection, and Clay Stories are paid, so a dry run would parse 0 qualifying free rows.

Wadsworth Atheneum Museum of Art.fail_implement: Official events page is gated by a Cloudflare managed challenge, so no stable event HTML or JSON payload is available from this environment.
